name: chain_how_we_automated_linkedin_lead_gen_using
method: How we automated LinkedIn lead gen using keyword triggers (without getting banned) Cold LinkedIn DMs are dying. In 2026, the average reply rate is under 2%, and the spam filters are more aggressive th

stages.task: Scrape LinkedIn search results for buying-signal keywords (tool recommendations, pain points, competitor complaints) across target niches. Use Playwright with Brave cookies for auth. Keywords: 'looking for a tool', 'any recommendations', 'alternative to', 'frustrated with', 'need help with'

Score each post by signal strength: direct ask (10), pain expression (8), competitor complaint (7), general discussion (4). Filter to score >= 6. Check poster profile: decision maker / budget holder / IC. Dedupe against previous outreach log.

Generate contextual comment for each qualified signal using Claude. Comment must: lead with genuine value (answer the question), mention relevant experience, include soft CTA (no hard sell). Match comment tone to post tone. Max 3 sentences. No links in first comment.
Post comments via Playwright browser automation. Rate limit: max 10 comments/day, min 5 min between comments, vary timing. Log all posted comments with timestamps.
24h later: check which comments got replies/likes. If reply detected, generate warm DM draft. Track conversion: comment → reply → DM → meeting → revenue.
